title: Saudi Arabian Eggplant Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine dish originating from Saudi Arabia, featuring eggplant as the main ingredient.

ingredients.name: xenial spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of Middle Eastern spices

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the eggplant and cook for 5 minutes, until it starts to soften.
Add the olives and honey, and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and simmer for 20 minutes, until the eggplant is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
